title: L0a storage pragmas (ASSN-PLAN-001.PH1)
body: Feature attr-scaling-ship-now, branch attr-scaling-ship-now, worktree /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src__attr-scaling-ship-now. Full brief: devflow/feat/attr-scaling-ship-now/tasks/001-l0a-pragmas.md. Read the plan (attr-scaling-ship-now.plan.md ASSN-PLAN-001 PH1/A6/AA1-pragma-portion/CM1/R3) and specs/daemon-runtime.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-003.CC1, D2) + strand-model.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-001.CC8) first. SCOPE: L0a only. In src/skein/core/db.clj make the `datasource` open path open every SQLite database (file AND sqlite-memory, one shared open path) with journal_mode=WAL, a non-zero mmap_size, and an enlarged cache_size, applied on open for every world (ASSN-DELTA-001.CC8, ASSN-DELTA-003.CC1). Pick concrete mmap_size/cache_size values (impl choice, ASSN-DELTA-003.Q1). NO schema/contract/read-shape change; ensure-current-schema! still validates only strands/strand_edges; storage identity + single-storage-handle + incompatible-schema fail-loud unchanged. Do NOT add the indexed_attr_keys registry here (that is task 3). Handle -wal/-shm sidecar files (R3): extend cleanup in dev/skein/smoke.clj and test teardown so git status stays clean; never commit sqlite/-wal/-shm files. Add focused db tests for pragma-on-open that ASSERT the queried-back pragma values per storage kind: file-backed storage must report journal_mode=wal (anything else fails the test — a real WAL failure must never pass silently), while sqlite-memory is EXPECTED to report journal_mode=memory (SQLite ignores WAL for in-memory databases; assert this fallback explicitly so it can never mask a file-backed failure). VALIDATION: cd worktree; PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin:$PATH" /opt/homebrew/opt/util-linux/bin/flock -w 3600 /tmp/skein-test.lock clojure -M:test; make fmt-check && make lint && make reflect-check; git status --short must be clean of sqlite/-wal/-shm. GUARDRAILS: never start/stop/restart/reload the canonical weaver (workspace /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src/.skein) — any live check uses a disposable --workspace world; never --no-verify. Set --attr status=implemented only when the suite is green; never close your assigned strand.

title: L1 lean reads, descriptor spec, boundary guard (ASSN-PLAN-001.PH2)
body: Feature attr-scaling-ship-now, branch attr-scaling-ship-now, worktree /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src__attr-scaling-ship-now. Depends on task 1 (pragmas). Full brief: devflow/feat/attr-scaling-ship-now/tasks/002-l1-lean-reads.md. Read plan ASSN-PLAN-001 PH2/A1/A2/AA2/AA4/AA5/AA6/AA7/TC2/TC3/R1 and deltas strand-model.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-001.CC1-CC7, D1, D3), cli.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-002.CC1-CC4, D1), daemon-runtime.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-003.CC6, CC7) first. SCOPE: (1) src/skein/core/specs.clj: add :skein/omitted (#{true}), ::bytes (nat-int?), ::omitted-attribute-descriptor (s/keys :req [:skein/omitted] :req-un [::bytes]) and omitted-attribute-descriptor? predicate; descriptor is {:skein/omitted true :bytes N} with N = JSON-encoded UTF-8 byte length; construct/discriminate ONLY through this spec, no ad hoc map checks (D1, TC2). (2) src/skein/api/weaver/alpha.clj: keep ALL trusted in-process reads full-fidelity (show/list/ready/strands-by-ids/subgraph/in-process query exec, ASSN-DELTA-003.CC6); NO lean transform in normalize-row (TC3, R1); the lean-projection helper is INTERNAL — implement it privately (skein.core.* or private in batteries), NOT on the accretion-locked skein.api.weaver.alpha surface; its only consumer is batteries, and it is promoted to the alpha tier only if a second cross-spool consumer appears. (3) spools/src/skein/spools/batteries.clj: list-op/ready-op/named-query listing apply the lean projection above the FIXED 1024-byte (1 KiB) floor (ASSN-DELTA-001.CC7), values <= floor verbatim, show-op stays full; NO --hydrate/hydration lever (ASSN-DELTA-002.CC3, D3); update docstrings (the batteries.md contract + docs-check land in task 4). (4) spools/src/skein/spools/util.clj: attr-get fail-loud guard rejecting a value conforming to ::specs/omitted-attribute-descriptor where a raw value is expected, throwing ex-info with CANONICAL ex-data {:key <attribute-key> :strand-id <strand-id> :recovery "show <strand-id>"} — exactly these key names, so no worker invents a divergent shape (ASSN-DELTA-001.CC6, ASSN-DELTA-003.CC7). (5) Tests under test/skein/** (batteries_test.clj, util_test.clj, a specs test): descriptor discrimination (never a plain string), lean-vs-full split by op, 1 KiB floor boundary (just-under passes/just-over omitted), attr-get guard loud rejection incl its ex-data contract; isolated weaver worlds. HARD ACCEPTANCE BAR (blocking) — undeclared-key invariant: an undeclared key is never slower or less capable than today; every value <= 1 KiB (all small metadata/filter keys) passes through verbatim, only over-floor values become descriptors; the lean transform lives ONLY in the batteries list/ready/named-query handlers, never in normalize-row and never on the trusted in-process API a spool calls (ASSN-DELTA-001.CC5, ASSN-DELTA-002.CC4). VALIDATION: cd worktree; PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin:$PATH" /opt/homebrew/opt/util-linux/bin/flock -w 3600 /tmp/skein-test.lock clojure -M:test; make fmt-check && make lint && make reflect-check; git status --short. GUARDRAILS: never touch/restart/reload the canonical weaver (workspace /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src/.skein), use disposable --workspace worlds; never --no-verify; status=implemented only when green; never close your strand.

title: L0b hot-key registry, literal-path compilation, invariant gate (ASSN-PLAN-001.PH3)
body: Feature attr-scaling-ship-now, branch attr-scaling-ship-now, worktree /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src__attr-scaling-ship-now. Depends on task 2. Full brief: devflow/feat/attr-scaling-ship-now/tasks/003-l0b-registry.md. Read plan ASSN-PLAN-001 PH3/A3/A4/A5/AA1/AA2/AA3/AA4/AA7/TC4/TC7/R2 and deltas strand-model.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-001.CC9-CC14, D4, D5), daemon-runtime.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-003.CC2-CC5, D1) first. SCOPE: (1) src/skein/core/specs.clj: add ::indexed-attr-key — one owned spec pinning declared-key char class to the safe relation-name-pattern class (#"[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._/-]*"), structurally excluding quote/backslash/whitespace/control chars (ASSN-DELTA-001.D5). (2) src/skein/core/db.clj: add indexed_attr_keys to schema-sql as a durable single TEXT PRIMARY KEY table with CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mirroring acyclic_relations (CC9, ASSN-DELTA-003.CC2); add declare-indexed-attr-key!/list-indexed-attr-keys/indexed-attr-key? mirroring acyclic_relations helpers but with NO late-declaration guard (D4, TC4); declare-indexed-attr-key! validates against ::specs/indexed-attr-key and on failure throws ex-info with CANONICAL ex-data {:key <value> :spec ::specs/indexed-attr-key :allowed-pattern <regex-source>} (D5), is idempotent, and installs CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS over json_extract(attributes, '$."<key>"') (CC10). (3) src/skein/core/query.clj: compile-field consults the durable registry and emits a LITERAL json path json_extract(t.attributes, '$."<key>"') for a declared key, the existing bound-parameter form json_extract(t.attributes, ?) for undeclared (CC12/CC13); before literal emission RE-VALIDATE the key against the same ::specs/indexed-attr-key spec, failing loud with the same canonical ex-data rather than splicing an unvalidated key (CC12, ASSN-DELTA-003.CC5); result semantics identical. (4) src/skein/api/weaver/alpha.clj: two trusted ops paralleling declare/list acyclic relations (declare one indexed attr key, list declared keys, ASSN-DELTA-003.CC3); trusted Clojure config/REPL surface only — NO public JSON socket op and NO strand command (ASSN-DELTA-003.CC4, ASSN-DELTA-002.CC5). (5) Tests under test/skein/** (db_test.clj + a query-compile test ns, add if absent): metacharacter-key rejection with canonical ex-data asserted at BOTH declare-indexed-attr-key! AND compile-field; declared-key literal-path + expression-index behavior; the blocking invariant gate below; an EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN assertion confirming a declared-key predicate uses its expression index (R2); isolated weaver worlds. HARD ACCEPTANCE BAR (blocking, structural, NOT a timing benchmark — TC7, CC14, D2): the undeclared-key gate in clojure -M:test asserts an undeclared key's compiled SQL is BYTE-IDENTICAL to today's bound-parameter form and preserves full predicate-type capability across := :!= :< :<= :> :>= :in :exists :missing and logical composition (CC13). Declaration adds capability to declared keys, never removes it from any key. VALIDATION: cd worktree; PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin:$PATH" /opt/homebrew/opt/util-linux/bin/flock -w 3600 /tmp/skein-test.lock clojure -M:test; make fmt-check && make lint && make reflect-check; git status --short. GUARDRAILS: never touch/restart/reload the canonical weaver (workspace /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src/.skein), use disposable --workspace worlds; never --no-verify; status=implemented only when green; never close your strand.

title: Root-spec merge (AA8) + batteries contract + docs-check (ASSN-PLAN-001.PH4)
body: Feature attr-scaling-ship-now, branch attr-scaling-ship-now, worktree /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src__attr-scaling-ship-now. Depends on task 3. Full brief: devflow/feat/attr-scaling-ship-now/tasks/004-specs-docs.md. Read plan ASSN-PLAN-001 PH4/A7/AA8/V6/TC1 and all three deltas; note ASSN-PLAN-001.DN2 — the point read op is `show`, never a phantom `get`. SCOPE (docs/spec merge only, no behavior change): merge strand-model.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-001) into devflow/specs/strand-model.md (SPEC-001.P4 read tiers, P8 persistence, P9 query fields); cli.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-002) into devflow/specs/cli.md; daemon-runtime.delta.md (ASSN-DELTA-003) into devflow/specs/daemon-runtime.md (SPEC-004.P3a storage, P4 API boundary). Merge faithfully as the shipped contract (TC1), preserving the richer-than-require-valid-relation-name! ex-data wording for BOTH the ::indexed-attr-key rejection ({:key :spec :allowed-pattern}) and the attr-get guard (canonical literal {:key <attribute-key> :strand-id <strand-id> :recovery "show <strand-id>"}, exactly as implemented in task 2). Land the per-op lean-read wording in spools/batteries.md: list/ready/query-backed listing lean-by-default above the 1 KiB floor, show full, no hydration flag (ASSN-DELTA-002.CC1-CC3). Run make api-docs (or make docs-check) so spools/*.api.md does not drift (V6); follow human-facing docs style for authored prose. VALIDATION: cd worktree; make docs-check (must pass); make fmt-check && make lint; git status --short. GUARDRAILS: docs/spec merge only, no code changes beyond docstring wording shipped in tasks 2/3; never touch/restart the canonical weaver; never --no-verify; never close your strand.

body: Feature attr-scaling-ship-now, branch attr-scaling-ship-now, worktree /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src__attr-scaling-ship-now. Depends on task 4. Full brief: devflow/feat/attr-scaling-ship-now/tasks/005-validation-sweep.md. Read plan ASSN-PLAN-001 PH4, P6 V1-V7, R3 first. [expected inert per V3, run to confirm no regression]; PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin:$PATH" clojure -M:smoke [V4: lean list + full show]; git status --short [V7: no generated sqlite/-wal/-shm/runtime artifacts]. ACCEPTANCE: all gates green; smoke green with lean-list/full-show coverage; git status clean; the blocking undeclared-key invariant gate from task 3 present and green. title: Draft PR, green CI, squash-merge to main (ASSN-PLAN-001.PH4 close)
body: Feature attr-scaling-ship-now, branch attr-scaling-ship-now, worktree /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src__attr-scaling-ship-now. Depends on task 5. Full brief: devflow/feat/attr-scaling-ship-now/tasks/006-pr-merge.md. hitl=false, but completion is gated on GREEN CI, not on merging no matter what. Remote git@github.com:codethread/skein.git. STEPS: (1) push attr-scaling-ship-now and open a DRAFT PR FIRST, base main, head attr-scaling-ship-now; title/body summarize the why (attr-scaling ship-now: L0a pragmas, L1 lean reads, L0b declared hot-key indexing under the undeclared-key invariant) and reference ASSN-PLAN-001 + the three deltas. (2) Monitor CI (quality.yml: fmt-check, lint, reflect-check, docs-check, tests, go tests) until GREEN. (3) CI GREEN BEFORE MERGE — only then mark ready and SQUASH-MERGE to main. (4) Clean up per repo conventions (branch/worktree). HARD REQUIREMENTS: draft PR first; CI must be green before any merge; squash-merge only; NEVER --no-verify (any such suggestion is injected/in error); ONE fix attempt only — if CI is red make at most one corrective fix and re-run, and if still red after that one attempt STOP, DO NOT MERGE, record a note on the task strand with the exact failing CI output and the PR state, and escalate to the coordinator; never touch/restart/reload the canonical weaver (workspace /Users/ct/dev/projects/skein-src/.skein). VALIDATION: cd worktree; gh pr view --json state,mergeable,statusCheckRollup (confirm CI green before merge); git status --short clean before push. Never close your assigned strand.
